name: tensorfeed
description: Live, machine-readable AI ecosystem and regulated-domain data: AI news across 12+ sources, model pricing across providers, AI service status, security advisories (CVE/KEV/EPSS/OSV), SEC EDGAR filings, FDA regulatory data (FAERS, drug labels, recalls, MAUDE), and US energy indicators via EIA Open Data. 17 free MCP tools, no auth required.
